title: Western Intelligence or Western Digital: The Fine Line Between Selling Drives and Espionag ransomware incident

victim.name: Western Intelligence or Western Digital: The Fine Line Between Selling Drives and Espionag

extortion.description: Western Digital Corporation is an American computer drive manufacturer and data storage company, headquartered in San Jose, California. It designs, manufactures and sells data technology products, including data storage devices, data center systems and cloud storage services.
